name: Apple French Toast Strata
recipeIngredient: 8 large slices of french bread, cubed
1 package (8 ounces) cream cheese, cut into cubes
1 large Granny Smith apple, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place half of the bread cubes in a greased 11 x 7 baking dish.
2. Cover with all of the cream cheese cubes, distributing evenly.
3. Sprinkle with apple slices.
4. Top with remaining bread cubes and almonds.
5. Beat together eggs, milk, and cinnamon until well blended.
6. Pour over the bread mixture in the dish.
7. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
8. Bake in a pre-heated 375-degree oven for about 35 minutes or until set.
9. Sprinkle with powdered sugar.
10. Serve with syrup.
